seoTitle: How to Find Your Slack Workspace URL Quickly
metaDescription: Learn how to locate your Slack workspace URL on desktop and mobile, useful for onboarding teammates or connecting external API integrations.
intro: Whether you're helping a new teammate sign in, setting up a mobile device, or configuring an API connection, you'll eventually need your exact Slack workspace URL. This guide shows where to find it on both desktop and mobile, and explains the difference between your workspace's display name and its permanent domain string, which typically looks like your-workspace.slack.com.

steps.heading: Open your workspace name header
steps.body: On desktop, click your primary workspace name at the top of the sidebar to reveal a dropdown with workspace details.

steps.heading: Locate the URL beneath your company name
steps.body: The dropdown displays your full web address directly under your workspace name, formatted as your-workspace.slack.com.

steps.heading: Copy the URL to your clipboard
steps.body: Highlight and copy the domain string so you can share it with a new teammate or paste it into an external tool that needs it.

steps.heading: Check your URL on mobile
steps.body: In the Slack mobile app, swipe right from the home tab and look at the subtext underneath your workspace icon to find the same address.

steps.heading: Ask an admin if you still can't find it
steps.body: If none of these methods work, workspace admins can confirm the exact subdomain path for you as a fallback.

faq.question: Is my workspace URL the same as my workspace name?
faq.answer: No, your display name can be changed freely, but your workspace URL is a more permanent domain string used for sign-ins and integrations.

faq.question: Can I change my Slack workspace URL?
faq.answer: Workspace URLs can sometimes be changed by an admin through workspace settings, though this may affect existing sign-in links and integrations.

faq.question: Why do I need my workspace URL for a new device?
faq.answer: Signing into Slack on a new device or through the web often asks for your workspace URL to route you to the correct login page.

faq.question: Does every teammate see the same workspace URL?
faq.answer: Yes, the workspace URL is shared across everyone in that workspace since it identifies the organization itself, not an individual account.
